paragraphs.source: Another alternative to CPO is “Co-packaged Copper” (CPC). CPC uses copper cabling emerging directly from a connector on substrate. Cables use for CPC are the same cables as flyovers and have the same purpose: to bypass the PCB traces. CPC takes flyover cables further with the socket starting on the package substrate itself. The cables used are twin-axial cables (Twinax cables) that are well insulated to reduce cross-talk, resulting in significantly lower insertion loss compared to conventional electrical traces. Though this solution still uses copper, it offers a key advantage in signal integrity. CPC could provide a practical path to deploying 448G SerDes so as to allow another scaling of off-package interconnect.

Cables use for CPC are the same cables as flyovers and have the same purpose: to bypass the PCB traces. CPC takes flyover cables further with the socket starting on the package substrate itself. The cables used are twin-axial cables (Twinax cables) that are well insulated to reduce cross-talk, resulting in significantly lower insertion loss compared to conventional electrical traces. Though this solution still uses copper, it offers a key advantage in signal integrity. CPC could provide a practical path to deploying 448G SerDes so as to allow another scaling of off-package interconnect.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Another alternative to CPO is “Co-packaged Copper” (CPC). CPC uses copper cabling emerging directly from a connector on substrate. Cables use for CPC are the same cables as flyovers and have the same purpose: to bypass the PCB traces. CPC takes flyover cables further with the socket starting on the package substrate itself. The cables used are twin-axial cables (Twinax cables) that are well insulated to reduce cross-talk, resulting in significantly lower insertion loss compared to conventional electrical traces. Though this solution still uses copper, it offers a key advantage in signal integrity. CPC could provide a practical path to deploying 448G SerDes so as to allow another scaling of off-package interconnect.

pro.text: 共封装铜缆（Co-packaged Copper，CPC）是共封装光学（CPO）的另一种替代方案。CPC采用直接从封装基板上的连接器引出的铜缆，所用电缆与飞线电缆相同，目的也一致：即绕过PCB走线。CPC将飞线电缆的概念进一步推进，将连接器直接置于封装基板之上。它使用的双轴电缆（Twinax电缆）绝缘良好，可显著降低串扰，与传统电气走线相比，插入损耗大幅降低。尽管该方案仍使用铜缆，但在信号完整性方面具备关键优势。CPC可提供一条实用的路径，以部署448G SerDes，从而实现封装外互连的又一次扩展。

issues.description: 章节标题及首次出现时未按要求提供完整英文缩写和中文解释
存在翻译腔和被动语态堆积，句子结构生硬
句子可更自然流畅，当前表达略显生涩
翻译为“我们将在下文进行探讨”属于典型的翻译腔书面语
程度词力度略有升级，“有望成为...的关键技术”比原文“could be”更确定
后半句语序可优化，当前表达略显倒装和书面化

paragraphs.source: The challenge with CPC lies in the added complexity of the package substrate. The substrate must route power and signals to thousands of these cables. Despite this challenge, CPC remains significantly simpler than CPO, which still has to overcome a number of manufacturing hurdles across multiple parts of the supply chain. We see CPC as particularly attractive for some short-reach applications such as in-rack scale up connectivity, which we will explore below. By bypassing lossy CCL traces, CPC could be the technology that enables 448G line speeds. CPC is also being looked at very broadly for enabling 448G as signals of this bandwidth experience unacceptable attenuation when running through PCBs.

By bypassing lossy CCL traces, CPC could be the technology that enables 448G line speeds. CPC is also being looked at very broadly for enabling 448G as signals of this bandwidth experience unacceptable attenuation when running through PCBs.

Despite this challenge, CPC remains significantly simpler than CPO, which still has to overcome a number of manufacturing hurdles across multiple parts of the supply chain. We see CPC as particularly attractive for some short-reach applications such as in-rack scale up connectivity, which we will explore below. By bypassing lossy CCL traces, CPC could be the technology that enables 448G line speeds. pro.text: CPC的挑战在于封装基板复杂度的增加。基板必须为数千条这样的电缆路由电源和信号。尽管存在这一挑战，CPC仍比CPO简单得多，后者还需要克服供应链多个环节的制造难题。我们认为CPC对于某些短距应用特别具有吸引力，例如机架内纵向扩展连接，我们将在后文详述。通过绕过有损耗的CCL走线，CPC有望成为实现448G线路速率的可行技术之一。该带宽的信号在PCB中传输时衰减过大，因此CPC也被广泛研究用于支持448G。
